Discover the latest publications from Genos, showcasing our groundbreaking research, scientific discoveries, and contributions to advancing knowledge in various fields. Stay updated with our cutting-edge work.

Publications

Genos has been on the forefront of glyco science. We’ve published over 150 publications over the course of 20 years. We continue to do this up to date, and we’re looking forward to future developments in our research field.

If you’re interested in working with us or using our services, submit a request for free and we’ll schedule a meeting to discuss your ideas.
